parameters.query: SELECT id, name, url, source_type, topic, enabled, last_fetched_at FROM news_sources ORDER BY topic, name

parameters.jsCode:
const sources = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { sources } }];

const data = $('Format Chat Response').first().json;
return [{ json: { reply: data.reply, sources: data.sources, searched_web: data.searched_web } }];

const meta = $('Save Prep').first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, article_id: meta.articleId, action: meta.action } }];

const ids = $input.all().map(i => i.json.article_id).filter(Boolean);
return [{ json: { ids } }];
